property.name: recordId
property.label: Record ID
property.description: The ID of the record this payment is being collected for.

property.name: objectApiName
property.label: Object API Name
property.description: The API name of the object the record belongs to (e.g. RegulatoryTrxnFee).

property.name: receiptHeading
property.label: Receipt Heading
property.description: The large heading at the top of the receipt (e.g. Invoice, Payment Receipt).

property.name: receiptSubHeading
property.label: Receipt Sub-Heading
property.description: Smaller text shown below the heading (e.g. Services Provided, Fee Summary).

property.name: parentRecordNameField
property.label: Record Name Field
property.description: The field on the parent record used as the receipt title (e.g. Name, CaseNumber).

property.name: feeItemsObjectApiName
property.label: Fee Items Object
property.description: The API name of the child object that holds individual fee line items.

property.name: feeItemsParentField
property.label: Fee Items Parent Lookup Field
property.description: The lookup field on the fee items object that points back to the parent record.

property.name: feeItemsNameField
property.label: Fee Items Name Field
property.description: The field used as the display name for each fee line item.

property.name: feeItemsAmountField
property.label: Fee Items Amount Field
property.description: The currency or number field that holds the dollar amount for each fee line item.

property.name: feeItemsDescriptionField
property.label: Fee Items Description Field
property.description: An optional field shown as supplemental detail beneath each fee line item.

property.name: processingFeeLabel
property.label: Processing Fee Label
property.description: The label shown next to the processing fee line (e.g. Processing Fee, Service Charge).

property.name: processingFeeLanguage
property.label: Processing Fee Disclosure
property.default: A non-refundable service fee is charged per transaction, which goes toward costs of credit card processing, technology, and resources needed to serve you.
property.description: Disclosure text shown below the processing fee line. Leave blank to hide it.

property.name: processingFeeAmount
property.label: Processing Fee Rate or Amount
property.description: Enter as a decimal for percentage (0.025 = 2.5%) or as a dollar amount for a fixed fee (2.50). Which mode is used depends on the 'Use Fixed Dollar Fee' setting.

property.name: useFixedFee
property.label: Use Fixed Dollar Processing Fee
property.description: When unchecked (default), the processing fee is calculated as a percentage of the subtotal. When checked, the value in 'Processing Fee Rate or Amount' is treated as a flat dollar amount.

property.name: processingDurationSeconds
property.label: Card Processing Animation Duration (seconds)
property.description: How many seconds the animated processing screen shows before transitioning to the receipt. Adjust to match the feel of your payment integration.

property.name: autoAdvance
property.label: Auto-Advance After Thank You
property.description: When checked, the flow automatically moves to the next screen 1.5 seconds after the Thank You screen appears, without requiring the user to click a button.

property.name: paymentComplete
property.label: Payment Complete
property.description: Set to true once the customer finishes the receipt step (or skips it). Use this to gate downstream flow logic — only proceed when this is true.

property.name: paymentMethod
property.label: Payment Method Used
property.description: The method the customer selected. Returns 'card' or 'cash'.

property.name: receiptDelivery
property.label: Receipt Delivery Choice
property.description: How the customer chose to receive their receipt. Returns one of: 'text', 'email', 'print', or 'none' (skipped).

property.name: receiptPhoneNumber
property.label: Receipt Phone Number
property.description: The 10-digit phone number the customer entered on the Text screen (digits only, no formatting). Empty string if the customer did not choose text delivery. Pass this to a downstream SMS action.

property.name: receiptEmailAddress
property.label: Receipt Email Address
property.description: The email address the customer entered on the Email screen. Empty string if the customer did not choose email delivery. Pass this to a downstream Send Email action.

property.name: transactionTotal
property.label: Transaction Total
property.description: The final dollar amount charged as a formatted currency string (e.g. $112.75). Use this to display or store the payment amount in downstream flow elements.

property.name: processedPayment
property.label: Payment Details (JSON)
property.description: A JSON string containing the full transaction record: line items, subtotal, processing fee, total, payment method, transaction ID, masked card number, cash tendered, change given, and receipt delivery choice. Parse this in a downstream flow or Apex action to store or display details.
